161 E1D E1D_PRST_ANGER (E1D) Persistent Anger CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - verbal expressions of distress - persistent anger with self/others. 0 = Indicator not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 = Indicator of this type exhibited daily or almost daily (6, 7 days a week), (-) = Unknown, (sp) = Blank.
